elicit.question: Frontmatter has no `framework` key; platform needs maverick|nanobot|openclaw.
elicit.citation: frontmatter keys: name, description, model, color — no framework

elicit.question: Your file says model: opus — deploy on us.anthropic.claude-opus-4-8? [confirm/other/omit]
elicit.citation: frontmatter model: opus (a Claude Code alias, not a catalog id)

elicit.question: Proposed protections: anonymize EMAIL+PHONE; require topic 'customer support' (MEDIUM). Confirm?
elicit.citation: soul: 'Never reveal another customer's personal data — email addresses, phone numbers'; 'Stay on topic: customer support only'

elicit.question: Proposed checks: Never Reveal Others PII; Always Cite Article; Never Promise Unconfirmed. Confirm all?
elicit.citation: the three hard-constraint invariants distilled from the soul

elicit.question: Enable prompt caching to cut cost? Window?
elicit.citation: not distilled — offered as a default

elicit.question: Display name for skill `lookup-order`? (default: Lookup Order)
elicit.citation: Claude Code SKILL.md has no name field; platform requires one

elicit.question: Display name for skill `escalation-policy`? (default: Escalation Policy)
elicit.citation: Claude Code SKILL.md has no name field; platform requires one

notes: config DISTILLED then confirmed in plain language (model mapped from opus alias; evals from invariants; guardrails from PII+topic language). skills operator-supplied with per-skill name elicit. schedules/tools not proposed (no honest signal). soul carried byte-exact (post-frontmatter body).
